title: Robust Crispy Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A sour and crispy solo dinner Mexican dish featuring Massaman paste and a flexitarian friendly cure, perfect for a weeknight meal. This recipe combines the flavors of Mexico with the spices of Massaman paste for a unique taste experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the Massaman paste, lime juice, and olive oil.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the Massaman paste mixture.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the toppings by shredding the cabbage and chopping the cilantro.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by slicing the cooked chicken and placing it onto a tortilla, then topping with sour cream, shredded cheese, cabbage, and cilantro.
